functions.name: openFilterEditor
functions.description: Creates and saves a Move-To-Folder filter for the given sender. Returns the result including whether the filter already existed and whether the message was moved.

accountId.description: Thunderbird account ID the message belongs to.

runAfterCreation.description: If true, move the displayed message to the target folder immediately.

useLocalFolders.description: If true, create the destination folder under Local Folders instead of the message account.

parentFolderName.description: If non-empty, all sender folders are created as children of this folder. The parent is created automatically if absent.
